h4: Search ``` ## 2) AFTER OPTIMIZED STRUCTURE ``` h1: Custom Bumper Magnets h2: Bumper Magnets Material & Construction Options h2: Bumper Magnets Finishing & Cut Options h2: Bumper Magnets Production Times & Turnaround h2: Payment & Ordering Bumper Magnets h2: Bumper Magnets Shipping Guidelines h2: Business & Personal Bumper Magnets Uses h2: Bumper Magnets Artwork Requirements h2: Professional Bumper Magnets for Every Vehicle h2: Frequently Asked Questions ``` ## 3) PRODUCT HEADER

Custom Bumper Magnets

Transform your vehicle into mobile advertising with custom bumper magnets designed for maximum durability and professional appeal. Our weatherproof bumper magnets feature full-color printing on premium 30-mil magnetic material, delivering vibrant graphics that withstand outdoor conditions while protecting your vehicle's finish. Perfect for businesses, campaigns, and personal messaging. See also [yard letter and number signs](https://www.banners.com/yard-letter-and-number-signs).

## 4) CONFIGURATOR LABELS - Size: Custom Bumper Magnet Dimensions - Material: Magnetic Material Options - Finishing: Cut Style & Corners - Quantity: Order Volume - Production: Turnaround Time ## 5) PRODUCT OVERVIEW TAB

Professional Bumper Magnets for Every Vehicle

Custom bumper magnets provide the perfect solution for removable vehicle advertising that travels wherever you go. Unlike permanent decals, these magnetic solutions allow you to promote your business, support causes, or display personal messages without compromising your vehicle's resale value. Our bumper magnets feature professional-grade 30-mil magnetic material with full-color printing capabilities, ensuring your design maintains vibrant colors and crisp details through all weather conditions.

Each bumper magnet includes protective lamination that guards against UV fading, moisture damage, and everyday wear. The strong magnetic hold keeps your message securely in place during highway driving while remaining easily removable when needed. Our custom car magnets are manufactured with rounded corners as standard, promoting better airflow and reducing wind lift for enhanced highway performance.

Available in custom sizes up to 24" x 24", these bumper magnets accommodate everything from compact promotional messages to large-format business advertising. Professional businesses rely on our magnetic signs for cost-effective fleet branding, while individuals use them for event promotion, political campaigns, and personal expression.

## 6) MATERIAL OPTIONS TAB

Bumper Magnets Material & Construction Options

Our custom bumper magnets utilize premium 30-mil magnetic material engineered specifically for automotive applications. This professional-grade thickness provides optimal magnetic strength while maintaining flexibility for curved bumper surfaces. The magnetic base features consistent polarity distribution, ensuring reliable adhesion across the entire surface area without weak spots or lifting corners.

Every bumper magnet includes protective lamination applied over the printed surface, creating a weatherproof barrier against rain, snow, UV rays, and road debris. This lamination process extends the lifespan of your graphics while maintaining color vibrancy throughout extended outdoor exposure. The smooth laminated finish also facilitates easy cleaning and maintenance.

Before ordering, verify that your vehicle's bumper contains magnetic-receptive steel. Our magnets will not adhere to aluminum, plastic, or composite bumper materials commonly found on newer vehicles. For non-magnetic surfaces, consider our truck magnetic signs designed for steel door panels and body sections.

## 7) FINISHING OPTIONS TAB

Bumper Magnets Finishing & Cut Options

Standard bumper magnets feature rounded corner finishing, the recommended option for highway driving and extended outdoor use. Rounded corners create improved airflow around the magnet edges, significantly reducing wind lift and preventing unwanted removal during high-speed travel. This finishing style also prevents corner damage from impact and handling.

For specialized applications, we offer square cut and custom contour cutting options. Square cut bumper magnets provide clean, sharp edges ideal for text-heavy designs and professional business applications. Custom contour cutting follows your design's outline, creating unique shapes that maximize visual impact while eliminating excess magnetic material.

Contour cut options work exceptionally well for logo-based designs, creating professional branded magnets that stand out from standard rectangular formats. However, consider that complex shapes may have reduced magnetic contact area, potentially affecting adhesion strength during extreme weather conditions or high-speed driving situations.

## 8) PRODUCTION TIMES TAB

Bumper Magnets Production Times & Turnaround

We offer flexible production schedules ranging from 1 to 5 business days to accommodate urgent deadlines and budget-conscious timelines. Priority 1-day production handles time-sensitive orders, while our popular 3-day standard option balances speed with cost-effectiveness for most bumper magnet projects.

Production time begins once artwork approval is complete and file upload finishes. Orders requiring design revisions or proof approval will start production timing from final approval confirmation. Express 2-day production works perfectly for promotional events and campaign launches with moderate lead times.

Our 5-day saver option reduces costs for large quantity orders or projects without deadline pressure. All production times exclude shipping duration, so factor delivery time when planning your project timeline. Emergency same-day production may be available for qualifying orders through customer service consultation.

## 9) PAYMENT OPTIONS TAB

Payment & Ordering Bumper Magnets

All custom bumper magnets require full payment before production begins, ensuring immediate processing once your order is approved. We accept all major credit cards including Visa, MasterCard, American Express, and Discover for instant payment processing and immediate production scheduling.

Check payments are also accepted but must clear before production starts, adding additional processing time to your project timeline. Your credit card will not be charged until you approve your final order details and artwork, providing complete control over your purchase decision.

For large quantity orders or repeat business customers, contact our customer service team to discuss available payment terms and bulk pricing options. Our flexible payment processing accommodates both individual orders and corporate purchasing requirements with appropriate documentation.

## 10) SHIPPING GUIDELINES TAB

Bumper Magnets Shipping Guidelines

Standard shipping utilizes UPS Ground service, delivering to 90% of the United States within 1-3 business days from our Minnesota production facility. Tracking information is automatically provided once your bumper magnets ship, allowing real-time delivery monitoring and planning.

Expedited shipping options include overnight, 2-day, and 3-day services for time-sensitive projects. Shipping costs are calculated based on package weight and destination, with additional charges applying to oversized orders requiring special handling or multiple packages.

International shipping requires customer-provided labels and customs documentation, with USPS and UPS as accepted carriers. Economy shipping adds 5-10 additional days but reduces costs for non-urgent deliveries. Contact customer service at (320) 391-5300 for specific shipping questions or special delivery requirements.

## 11) COMMON USES TAB

Business & Personal Bumper Magnets Uses

Business professionals utilize bumper magnets for mobile advertising campaigns that transform personal and company vehicles into moving billboards. Service businesses like contractors, real estate agents, and consultants rely on bumper magnets to generate leads and increase brand visibility throughout their local markets without permanent vehicle modifications.

Political campaigns and nonprofit organizations leverage bumper magnets for candidate promotion and cause advocacy, allowing supporters to display temporary messages during election cycles or awareness campaigns. The removable nature enables message updates and prevents permanent vehicle alterations that might concern supporters.

Personal applications include family announcements, event promotion, sports team support, and hobby group identification. Wedding announcements, graduation celebrations, and milestone events become mobile celebrations with custom bumper magnets. Consider our custom fridge magnets for indoor promotional materials and custom dry erase magnets for interactive business applications.

## 12) ARTWORK TAB

Bumper Magnets Artwork Requirements

Vector-based files like .eps formats with outlined fonts produce the highest quality results for bumper magnet printing. High-resolution PDF and JPG files are also acceptable, provided they meet minimum 300 DPI resolution requirements for crisp, professional output.

Our graphic design team can assist with file optimization and quality assessment if you're uncertain about your artwork specifications. Professional design services are available for customers requiring complete design creation or significant modifications to existing artwork.

Order proofs allow artwork review and approval before production begins, ensuring complete satisfaction with your final design. Color-critical projects benefit from our Color Match Proof System, providing precise color accuracy for brand-specific requirements. Contact customer service for color matching consultation and detailed specifications.

## 13) POST-TAB CONTENT

Professional Bumper Magnets for Every Vehicle

Custom bumper magnets represent the ideal balance between effective advertising and vehicle protection, offering businesses and individuals a professional marketing solution without permanent modifications. Our premium 30-mil magnetic material ensures reliable performance across diverse weather conditions while maintaining easy removal when circumstances change.

Whether you're launching a new business campaign, supporting a political candidate, or announcing a special event, bumper magnets provide the flexibility and professional appearance your message deserves. The combination of full-color printing capabilities, protective lamination, and custom sizing options creates unlimited possibilities for effective mobile advertising.

With production times ranging from 1 to 5 business days and comprehensive shipping options, your custom bumper magnets can be ready when you need them. Trust our two decades of printing expertise to deliver the quality and service your project demands, backed by professional customer support throughout the entire ordering process.

## 14) FAQ

Frequently Asked Questions

Will bumper magnets stick to my vehicle's bumper?

Bumper magnets require magnetic-receptive steel surfaces to adhere properly. Many modern vehicles feature aluminum, plastic, or composite bumpers that won't hold magnets. Test with a small magnet first, or consider our truck magnetic signs for steel door panels and body sections instead.

How long do custom bumper magnets last outdoors?

Our laminated bumper magnets typically last 3-5 years with proper care and maintenance. UV-resistant inks and protective lamination guard against fading and weather damage. Regular cleaning and removal during extreme weather extends lifespan significantly while maintaining professional appearance.

Can I upload my own design for bumper magnets?

Yes, we accept various file formats including vector files (.eps), high-resolution PDFs, and JPG images. Vector files with outlined fonts produce the best results. Our design team can review your artwork quality and provide optimization recommendations before production begins.

Are bumper magnets safe for painted vehicle surfaces?

Our magnetic material is specifically designed for automotive use and won't damage factory paint finishes when properly maintained. Remove magnets periodically for cleaning both the magnet and vehicle surface to prevent dirt accumulation. Avoid sliding magnets across painted surfaces during installation or removal.

Do you offer bulk pricing for large bumper magnet orders?

Yes, quantity discounts apply to larger orders, with significant savings available for business and organizational purchases. Contact our customer service team to discuss volume pricing, custom quotes, and extended payment terms for qualifying bulk orders and repeat business customers.

Can bumper magnets go through automatic car washes?

We recommend removing bumper magnets before entering automatic car washes to prevent potential damage or loss. High-pressure water, brushes, and chemical cleaners can affect magnetic adhesion and potentially damage the printed surface. Hand washing around magnets is the safest cleaning method.
